output_excerpt: > node --test test/file-bridge.test.mjs test/file-picker-gesture.test.mjs test/file-upload-bridge.test.mjs test/file-save-as.test.mjs test/temp-preview-cleanup.test.mjs && cd ../.. && node scripts/validate-desktop-file-bridge-contract.mjs && node scripts/validate-matter-desktop-file-bridge.mjs
# Subtest: file bridge suite keeps contract actions and audit map aligned
ok 1 - file bridge suite keeps contract actions and audit map aligned

ok 2 - file bridge suite script includes happy denied no silent scan and cache wipe coverage

ok 3 - file picker is blocked without a user gesture

ok 4 - file picker opens only after a scoped gesture token

ok 6 - renderer byte policy blocks file bytes and keeps only allowlisted bridge fields

ok 1 - auth coordinator starts PKCE login without exposing verifier or tokens

ok 2 - auth coordinator stores token material in secure store and returns session status only

ok 3 - auth coordinator rejects state mismatch and clears session on logout

ok 4 - auth coordinator signs into AWS runtime account without exposing operator material

ok 5 - runtime config loads AWS execute-api URL and operator credential from local env shape
# Subtest: runtime client keeps bearer credential in main-process fetch and returns sanitized account data
ok 6 - runtime client keeps bearer credential in main-process fetch and returns sanitized account data
# Subtest: temp preview cache is removed on logout tenant switch and app quit
ok 55 - temp preview cache is removed on logout tenant switch and app quit

ok 56 - temp preview rejects renderer-supplied bytes before permission precheck creates a file
# Subtest: signed update applies only after signature check
ok 57 - signed update applies only after signature check

ok 58 - signed rollback returns to last verified internal version
